_meta.source: NVIDIA NIM API & Open Weights Literature
_meta.note: Curated specifications for all active and recorded benchmarking models.

Coding.description: Optimized for code generation, completion, and refactoring.

Reasoning.description: Chain-of-thought, math, logic, and multi-step problem solving.

Agentic.description: Tool use, planning, and function calling.

Long Context.description: Context window of 128K tokens or more.

Multimodal.description: Accepts images, video, or audio in addition to text.

abacusai/dracarys-llama-3.1-70b-instruct.description: 70B reasoning-focused fine-tune of Llama 3.1 optimized for coding, logic, and data science.

ai21labs/jamba-1.5-large-instruct.description: SSM-Transformer hybrid MoE model offering long-context capabilities and high efficiency.

aisingapore/sea-lion-7b-instruct.description: 7B model specifically pre-trained and fine-tuned for Southeast Asian languages and cultural contexts.

bigcode/starcoder2-15b.description: 15B parameter model trained on over 600 programming languages, optimized for code generation.

bytedance/seed-oss-36b-instruct.description: 36B open-weights model designed for general chat instruction and high-quality text generation.

databricks/dbrx-instruct.description: 132B MoE model (36B active) optimized for general instruction following and mathematical reasoning.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct.description: 6.7B model trained on coding datasets, showcasing top-tier performance for code writing.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-flash.description: 284B MoE model with 1M-token context optimized for fast coding and agents.

deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-pro.description: 671B frontier MoE reasoning and coding model with ultra-large parameters, optimizing for extreme precision.

google/codegemma-1.1-7b.description: 7B coding model optimized for code completion and code assistant tasks.

google/codegemma-7b.description: 7B base code assistant for code completion, code explanation, and mathematical reasoning.

google/diffusiongemma-26b-a4b-it.description: 26B sparse MoE model (4B active) designed for high performance and low-latency instruction following.

google/gemma-2-2b-it.description: 2.6B parameter model delivering top-tier performance for lightweight on-device instruction.

google/gemma-2b.description: 2B parameters lightweight base model for text tasks, classification, and extraction.

google/gemma-3-12b-it.description: 12B multimodal model with advanced reasoning capabilities for text and image understanding.

google/gemma-3-4b-it.description: 4B lightweight multimodal model for fast on-device vision-language operations.

google/gemma-3n-e2b-it.description: Speculative Gemma 3N MoE model featuring a 2-expert routing system for highly efficient generation.

google/gemma-3n-e4b-it.description: Speculative Gemma 3N MoE model featuring a 4-expert routing system balancing speed and reasoning.

google/gemma-4-31b-it.description: High-performance instruction-following model in the Gemma-4 series, balancing speed and reasoning.

google/recurrentgemma-2b.description: 2B model using a recurrent linear attention architecture (Griffin) for efficient sequence inference.

ibm/granite-34b-code-instruct.description: 34B model optimized for professional coding assistance, debugging, and code translation.

ibm/granite-8b-code-instruct.description: 8B model optimized for code generation, completion, and basic software engineering workflows.

meta/codellama-70b.description: 70B state-of-the-art coding assistant trained by Meta on software repositories.

meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct.description: 70B Llama 3.1 model optimized for multilingual dialogue, reasoning, coding, and complex agentic tasks.

meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.description: 8B Llama 3.1 model offering great performance for chat, summarization, and instruction following.

meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.description: 11B vision-language model trained for high-quality reasoning on images and diagrams.
